summary: Queue throttling, retry, cancellation, resume, and product evidence writers are implemented. One real Codex Generate-runner smoke produced a succeeded one-slide queue artifact, and a deterministic product queue-control smoke now writes ready DF-233 evidence for bounded 5xx retry, in-flight cancellation that rejects a late provider output, and restart-resume that does not regenerate a completed slide. No packaged Codex OAuth image run has captured genuine provider retry, user cancellation, and restart-resume evidence from the app surface.
